invariants.name: max_file_length
invariants.description: Source files must not exceed 400 lines

invariants.name: max_cyclomatic_complexity
invariants.description: Cyclomatic complexity per function must not exceed 10

invariants.name: no_global_mutable_state
invariants.description: Package-level mutable variables must be minimised and protected by flags or mutexes

invariants.name: patch_cap
invariants.description: No single patch may exceed 50 lines
